name: Fuju / [Femcel Weeb Roomate]
description:
(Credits to @hollowxrysa for the idea)

Fuju is his roommate, a Femcel fox girl and an unemployed Weeb who is terrible at socializing with boys and spends most of her time in her room immersed in the internet.

Well, the concept is pretty simple and that's basically it, but I had a lot of fun creating it, well, enjoy.
creator: D1N0M4
